description_long: This is a modern L-shaped kitchen cabinet set designed for urban interiors, featuring a combination of matte black lower cabinets and natural wood-finished upper cabinets. The set includes a tall pantry unit on the right, two wall-mounted cabinets, and a central section with a built-in sink and under-counter appliances. The cabinetry is sleek and handleless, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic, with flat panel doors and drawers. The countertop is dark and continuous, providing ample workspace, while the upper cabinets offer additional storage. The unit is built into a corner, with two walls providing structural support and a partial third wall enclosing the left side. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for compact urban kitchens.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinet set with matte black lower cabinets, natural wood upper cabinets, and a tall pantry, built into a corner with a minimalist, handleless design.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the plain exterior wall and a partial glimpse of the tall pantry unit in wood finish.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the full kitchen layout, including the black lower cabinets, wood upper cabinets, central sink, and tall pantry on the right.
description_view_2: The top-down angled view highlights the L-shaped configuration, the arrangement of cabinets, and the integrated appliances.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the plain exterior wall and a partial view of the tall pantry unit.
